3111850.name: Patchworld
3111850.description:
FORGE YOUR MAGIC IN A WORLD TEARING ITSELF APART

Ten years ago, the northern lands of Karamarin witnessed an unimaginable catastrophe. In the blink of an eye, vast expanses vanished: cities and castles, ancient forests and mighty rivers, even entire nations—all wiped from the face of the earth. And in their place, like a patch sewn onto the world's torn canvas, alien lands appeared. Lands unknown to bards or mapmakers—a landscape burning with an unnatural crimson beneath a sky frozen in eternal radiance. Thus, the very first patch from another world appeared. But it arrived not alone, bringing with it unspeakable creatures and magic shards.

People quickly learned to craft spells from these shards, and some even dedicated their lives to studying them.

YOUR ARSENAL IS YOUR CREATIVITY

  • Unbound Creation. Combine found magic shards to craft exactly the spell you crave. A Firewall that summons minions? Chain Lightning that teleports you? Or something utterly inconceivable? There's room for the most daring experiments—all you need are the right shards.

  • Easy to Start. Even a random handful of shards will yield a functional spell. Not ready for complex crafting? Just use what you've got! The system's true depth awaits those who strive to forge the perfect tool for any situation.

  • Find Every Monster's Weakness. Creatures boast unique sets of vulnerabilities and special resistances. Build an arsenal of spells to fight different foes with maximum efficiency.

  • Explore Reality's Tears. Journey through patches—zones with unique aesthetics and rules from other worlds. Face new enemies, acquire rare shards, and uncover the Cataclysm's core secret. Each patch draws inspiration from real-world cultures and folklore.

  • Journey Solo or With Friends. Embark on a story-driven adventure to unravel the Cataclysm's nature—alone or in online co-op for up to 8 players.

  • Find Your Style. Choose your class: Battlemage, Arcane Smith, or Magic Seeker. Each boasts a unique combat style and a distinct system for crafting abilities and gear.

CRAVING A TRUE CHALLENGE?

  • Uncompromising Mode. Activate a special mode where spells cannot tell friend from foe. You'll need to meticulously plan every aspect of your creations—one mistake, and your own magic could backfire with devastating force.

  • Legendary Bosses. Take on unfathomable entities whose vulnerabilities defy conventional logic. Defeating them demands boundless ingenuity, preparation, and mastery.

Patchworld calls to those unafraid to peer into the abyss between worlds. Can you unravel its secrets, even if the truth turns everything upside down? Your magic is the key. But what door will it unlock?
3111850.supported_languages:
英语, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
